generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for vehicle environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARRawDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2 within Physical Twin"
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node in Physical Twin serializing, aligning, and converting vehicle state data for inter-entity transmission"
]

instance VehicleStateAndObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataTranslationComponent
    base:desc "Serialized vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP from Physical Twin to Digital Twin"
]

instance VehicleStateAndObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed vehicle state data in Digital Twin for monitoring and management"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateAndObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks; supports saving and generating reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, SaveReportAction, GenerateReportAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving paths"
]

instance SaveReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saves current data state as a report"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates a detailed report from collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization and report generation services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transfers ACC functions (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation commands) from onboard ECUs to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionOffload, SpeedCalculationOffload, ActuationCommandOffload
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionOffload : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads lead vehicle detection computation to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedCalculationOffload : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads speed calculation based on distance to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationCommandOffload : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads actuation command generation to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for offloading ACC computations to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to control ACC, set speeds, and issue emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, IssueEmergencyBraking
]

instance EnableDisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables or disables Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets the desired speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance IssueEmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking command for safety"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote operation and management of ADAS systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization subcomponent of User Interface for Digital Twin"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface for Digital Twin"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User entity deployed as ROS2 package for operator interaction"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity deployed as ROS2 package with automotive functionality including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity deployed as ROS2 package providing data monitoring, computation offloading, and remote management services"
]

instance DataStorageComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data storage component for Digital Twin without front-end interface"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, LiDARSensor, DataTranslationComponent
    base:desc "Physical Twin environment on separate hardware with sensor and processing components"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, DataStorageComponent
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment on separate hardware for data processing and services"
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntity, ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
    base:desc "User environment for interaction with Digital Twin"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronization accuracy of 100 ms required for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, where industry standards typically mandate stricter synchronization (e.g., <100 ms), but hardware limitations constrain the system to 100 ms accuracy."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 RA-based architecture mapping software components to FEs, implemented as ROS2 packages with nodes per FE. Entities (Physical, Digital, User) deployed on dedicated hardware, with Physical Twin Entity extending beyond standard to include general automotive functions. Coordination managed via ROS2 communication between entities and nodes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, and inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2021 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity for data collection and control, Digital Twin Entity for digital representation of OME, and User Entity for user interaction interfaces. Functional Entities (FEs) within each entity handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture cited as a possible implementation example for FEs, though the standard does not specify implementation details for FEs."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "ISO 26262-1:2018 specifies functional safety requirements for road vehicles, including hazard analysis and risk assessment (HARA), Automotive Safety Integrity Level (ASIL) determination, and implementation of safety mechanisms such as fault detection, error correction, and safe states to mitigate risks from electrical/electronic system failures."
]
